ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "preferred_positions" TEXT /* Preferred positions of the player */,
  "national_kit_number" INTEGER /* Kit number for the national team */,
  "national_position" TEXT /* Position for the national team */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "date_of_last_update" TEXT /* Date when the player's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the club */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the club's manager */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Club's official website */,
  "number_of_titles" INTEGER /* Number of titles won by the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_club_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's tenure at the club */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's tenure at the club */,
  "kit_number" INTEGER /* Kit number of the player at the club */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player at the club */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "loan" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is on loan */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_club_history_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_club_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ball_skills_ball_control" INTEGER /* Ball control skill */,
  "ball_skills_dribbling" INTEGER /* Dribbling skill */,
  "defence_marking" INTEGER /* Marking skill */,
  "defence_tackling" INTEGER /* Tackling skill */,
  "mental_aggression" INTEGER /* Aggression level */,
  "mental_composure" INTEGER /* Composure level */,
  "mental_reactions" INTEGER /* Reactions speed */,
  "passing_crossing" INTEGER /* Crossing skill */,
  "passing_long_pass" INTEGER /* Long passing skill */,
  "passing_short_pass" INTEGER /* Short passing skill */,
  "physical_acceleration" INTEGER /* Acceleration speed */,
  "physical_sprint_speed" INTEGER /* Sprint speed */,
  "physical_stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina level */,
  "physical_strength" INTEGER /* Strength level */,
  "shooting_fk_accuracy" INTEGER /* Free kick accuracy */,
  "shooting_finishing" INTEGER /* Finishing skill */,
  "shooting_heading" INTEGER /* Heading skill */,
  "shooting_long_shots" INTEGER /* Long shots skill */,
  "shooting_shot_power" INTEGER /* Shot power */,
  "goalkeeper_diving" INTEGER /* Goalkeeper diving skill */,
  "goalkeeper_positioning" INTEGER /* Goalkeeper positioning skill */,
  "goalkeeper_handling" INTEGER /* Goalkeeper handling skill */,
  "goalkeeper_reflexes" INTEGER /* Goalkeeper reflexes skill */,
  "defence_interceptions" INTEGER /* Interception skill */,
  "mental_vision" INTEGER /* Vision level */,
  "mental_decisions" INTEGER /* Decision-making skill */,
  "physical_balance" INTEGER /* Balance level */,
  "shooting_volleys" INTEGER /* Volley shooting skill */,
  "shooting_composure" INTEGER /* Composure in shooting */,
  "goalkeeper_kicking" INTEGER /* Kicking skill for goalkeepers */,
  "goalkeeper_aerial_ability" INTEGER /* Aerial ability for goalkeepers */,
  "date_of_last_update" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any performance-based bonuses */,
  "release_clause" REAL /* Release clause amount */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contract is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., club manager, national team coach, scout) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, bone fracture) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the injury */,
  "rehabilitation_plan" TEXT /* Description of the rehabilitation plan */,
  "recovery_progress" INTEGER /* Progress of recovery (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "appearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored in the match */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Assists made in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received in the match */,
  "minutes_played_first_half" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the first half */,
  "minutes_played_second_half" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the second half */,
  "substituted_in" TEXT /* Time of substitution in (if applicable) */,
  "substituted_out" TEXT /* Time of substitution out (if applicable) */,
  "yellow_cards_first_half" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received in the first half */,
  "yellow_cards_second_half" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received in the second half */,
  "red_cards_first_half" INTEGER /* Red cards received in the first half */,
  "red_cards_second_half" INTEGER /* Red cards received in the second half */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_appearances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_appearances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "league_cup" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match is a league or cup match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referees" TEXT /* Names of the assistant referees */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the national team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "fifa_rank" INTEGER /* FIFA ranking of the team */,
  "confederation" TEXT /* Confederation to which the national team belongs */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the national team */,
  "last_world_cup_appearance" INTEGER /* Year of the last World Cup appearance */,
  "last_world_cup_results" TEXT /* Results of the last World Cup (e.g., quarter-finals, semi-finals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the training session (e.g., technical, physical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach leading the session */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Names of the assistant coaches */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players attending the session */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session (e.g., successful, needs improvement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES national_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_training_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Whether the player attended the session */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player in the session (1-100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the coach */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of attendance */,
  "absence_reason" TEXT /* Reason for absence if the player did not attend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_training_participation_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_training_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
